includena-help:
Image records may have data fields not available and assigned a value of "N/A".
   • When selected, any image with an "N/A" value in any data field will be included in the search results. By default, the N/A box is checked.
   • For example, if you are searching for a MALE subject, images with a Gender value of "N/A" will be included in your search results.
   • If the N/A box is NOT checked, all records with a Gender value of "N/A" will be excluded from the search.
   • It is advised to select the N/A box unless you want to limit your search results with fields only with valid data.

msgwarningverify: The following search results are ranked in numerical order based upon the probability of a potential link between your submitted probe image and previously submitted cartridge case images in the Ballistics IQ gallery. Trained technicians should review returned search results to identify potential correlations between submitted images and those in the gallery. These results should not be considered confirmations of a potential link and are intended to provide investigators with a potential investigative lead.  Microscopic examination by a trained Forensic Firearm Examiner is required to confirm potential links identified in the returned results.
msgwarningverify2: Ballistics IQ has generated a correlation between the incidents listed in this report as an investigative lead. This notification is not intended to establish probable cause for arrest.  Microscopic examination by a trained firearms examiner is required to confirm the associations identified in this report.
